symbols.name: EntityChangeBuilder
symbols.summary: Fluent builder for applying complex changes to entities.
symbols.remarks: Initializes a new instance of the BridgingIT.DevKit.Domain.Model.EntityChangeBuilder%601 class.

syntax.content: public class EntityChangeBuilder where TEntity : IEntity

symbols.name: EntityChangeBuilder(TEntity)
symbols.summary: Fluent builder for applying complex changes to entities.
symbols.remarks: Initializes a new instance of the BridgingIT.DevKit.Domain.Model.EntityChangeBuilder%601 class.

syntax.content: public EntityChangeBuilder(TEntity entity)

symbols.name: RegisterEnsureSingle(bool)
symbols.summary: Specifies whether to replace existing domain events of the same type.

syntax.content: public EntityChangeBuilder RegisterEnsureSingle(bool replace = true)

symbols.name: RegisterNoEvents(bool)
symbols.summary: Specifies that no domain events should be registered when changes are applied.

syntax.content: public EntityChangeBuilder RegisterNoEvents(bool noEvents = true)

symbols.name: Execute(Func, Result>)
symbols.summary: Applies a transformation to the entity using Result functional extensions at the current position. Enables use of Result functional extensions (Map, Bind, Tap, Ensure, Filter, etc.). Can be used standalone or chained after Set/Add/Remove operations. Multiple Execute calls are executed sequentially at their declaration points.

syntax.content: public EntityChangeBuilder Execute(Func, Result> transformation)

parameters.description: Function to transform the Result. Receives Result{TEntity}, returns Result{TEntity}.
Function to transform the Result. Receives Result{TEntity}, returns Result{TEntity}.

symbols.name: Set(Expression>, TValue, IEqualityComparer)
symbols.summary: Queues a property change with a direct value.

syntax.content: public EntityChangeBuilder Set(Expression> propertyExpression, TValue newValue, IEqualityComparer comparer = null)

symbols.name: Set(Expression>, Func, IEqualityComparer)
symbols.summary: Queues a property change with a computed value.

syntax.content: public EntityChangeBuilder Set(Expression> propertyExpression, Func valueFactory, IEqualityComparer comparer = null)

symbols.name: Set(Expression>, Result, IEqualityComparer)
symbols.summary: Queues a property change using a BridgingIT.DevKit.Common.Result%601. If the Result is a Failure, the entire transaction will fail when BridgingIT.DevKit.Domain.Model.EntityChangeBuilder%601.Apply is called.

syntax.content: public EntityChangeBuilder Set(Expression> propertyExpression, Result result, IEqualityComparer comparer = null)

symbols.name: Set(Expression>, Func>, IEqualityComparer)
symbols.summary: Queues a property change using a function that returns a BridgingIT.DevKit.Common.Result%601.

syntax.content: public EntityChangeBuilder Set(Expression> propertyExpression, Func> valueFactory, IEqualityComparer comparer = null)

symbols.name: Add(Expression>>, TItem, IEqualityComparer)
symbols.summary: Queues an operation to add an item to a collection property.

syntax.content: public EntityChangeBuilder Add(Expression>> collectionExpression, TItem item, IEqualityComparer comparer = null)

symbols.name: Add(Expression>>, Result, IEqualityComparer)
symbols.summary: Queues an operation to add an item to a collection property using a BridgingIT.DevKit.Common.Result%601. If the Result is a Failure, the entire transaction will fail when BridgingIT.DevKit.Domain.Model.EntityChangeBuilder%601.Apply is called.

syntax.content: public EntityChangeBuilder Add(Expression>> collectionExpression, Result result, IEqualityComparer comparer = null)

symbols.name: Add(Expression>>, Func>, IEqualityComparer)
symbols.summary: Queues an operation to add an item to a collection property using a function that returns a BridgingIT.DevKit.Common.Result%601. If the computed Result is a Failure, the transaction stops and returns that failure.

syntax.content: public EntityChangeBuilder Add(Expression>> collectionExpression, Func> itemFactory, IEqualityComparer comparer = null)

symbols.name: Remove(Expression>>, TItem, IEqualityComparer, string, IResultError)
symbols.summary: Queues an operation to remove an item from a collection property. Returns a failure with BridgingIT.DevKit.Common.NotFoundError if the item is not found in the collection.

syntax.content: public EntityChangeBuilder Remove(Expression>> collectionExpression, TItem item, IEqualityComparer comparer = null, string errorMessage = null, IResultError error = null)

parameters.description: Expression selecting the collection property.
The item to remove.
Optional equality comparer for item comparison.
Optional custom error message when item is not found. If null, uses default message.
Expression selecting the collection property.
The item to remove.
Optional equality comparer for item comparison.
Optional custom error message when item is not found. If null, uses default message.

symbols.name: Remove(Expression>>, Result, IEqualityComparer, string, IResultError)
symbols.summary: Queues an operation to remove an item from a collection property using a BridgingIT.DevKit.Common.Result%601. If the Result is a Failure, the entire transaction will fail when BridgingIT.DevKit.Domain.Model.EntityChangeBuilder%601.Apply is called. Returns a failure with BridgingIT.DevKit.Common.NotFoundError if the item is not found in the collection.

Result containing the item to remove.

Optional custom error message when item is not found. If null, uses default message.

symbols.name: RemoveBy(Expression>>, Func>, IEqualityComparer, string, IResultError)
symbols.summary: Queues an operation to remove an item from a collection property using a function that returns a BridgingIT.DevKit.Common.Result%601. If the computed Result is a Failure, the transaction stops and returns that failure. Returns a failure with BridgingIT.DevKit.Common.NotFoundError if the item is not found in the collection.

Optional equality comparer for item comparison.
Optional custom error message when item is not found. If null, uses default message.

symbols.name: RemoveById(Expression>>, TId, IEqualityComparer, string, IResultError)
symbols.summary: Queues an operation to remove an item from a collection by its ID. The item type must implement BridgingIT.DevKit.Domain.Model.IEntity%601. Returns a failure with BridgingIT.DevKit.Common.NotFoundError if no item with the specified ID is found.

Optional custom error message when item is not found. If null, uses default message.

symbols.name: Clear(Expression>>)
symbols.summary: Queues an operation to clear all items from a collection property.

syntax.content: public EntityChangeBuilder Clear(Expression>> collectionExpression)

symbols.name: Set(Expression>>, Action)
symbols.summary: Applies an action to all items in a collection. If collection is empty, returns success with hasChanged = false.

syntax.content: public EntityChangeBuilder Set(Expression>> collectionExpression, Action action)

parameters.description: Expression selecting the collection property.
Action to apply to each item in the collection.
Expression selecting the collection property.
Action to apply to each item in the collection.

symbols.name: Set(Expression>>, Func)
symbols.summary: Applies a Result-returning action to all items in a collection. If any action fails, the transaction stops and returns that failure. If collection is empty, returns success with hasChanged = false.

syntax.content: public EntityChangeBuilder Set(Expression>> collectionExpression, Func action)

parameters.description: Expression selecting the collection property.
Result-returning action to apply to each item.
Expression selecting the collection property.
Result-returning action to apply to each item.

symbols.name: SetBy(Expression>>, Func, Action)
symbols.summary: Applies an action to filtered items in a collection. If no items match the filter, returns success with hasChanged = false.

Predicate to filter items.
Action to apply to each matching item.

symbols.summary: Applies a Result-returning action to filtered items in a collection. If any action fails, the transaction stops and returns that failure. If no items match the filter, returns success with hasChanged = false.

symbols.summary: Applies an action to a single item in a collection identified by its ID. Returns a failure with BridgingIT.DevKit.Common.NotFoundError if no item with the specified ID is found.

The ID of the item to operate on.

symbols.summary: Applies a Result-returning action to a single item in a collection identified by its ID. Returns a failure with BridgingIT.DevKit.Common.NotFoundError if no item with the specified ID is found. If the action fails, returns that failure.

symbols.name: When(Func)
symbols.summary: Adds a circuit breaker condition at the current position in the operation chain. If the predicate returns false when executed, ALL remaining operations after this point are cancelled. Operations before this When() execute normally.

syntax.content: public EntityChangeBuilder When(Func predicate)

parameters.description: The condition to evaluate against the entity.
The condition to evaluate against the entity.

symbols.name: Ensure(Func, string)
symbols.summary: Adds a pre-condition check at the current position. If the predicate returns false, the transaction aborts.

syntax.content: public EntityChangeBuilder Ensure(Func predicate, string errorMessage)

symbols.name: Ensure(Func, IResultError)
symbols.summary: Adds a pre-condition check at the current position. If the predicate returns false, the transaction aborts.

syntax.content: public EntityChangeBuilder Ensure(Func predicate, IResultError error)

symbols.name: Execute(Action)
symbols.summary: Executes an arbitrary action on the entity at the current position. If the action throws an unhandled exception, the transaction stops and returns a failure.

syntax.content: public EntityChangeBuilder Execute(Action action)

symbols.name: Set(Func)
symbols.summary: Applies changes by calling a method that returns a BridgingIT.DevKit.Common.Result on the entity. If the Result is a Failure, the transaction stops and returns that failure.

syntax.content: public EntityChangeBuilder Set(Func func)

symbols.name: Set(Func>)
symbols.summary: Applies changes by calling a method that returns a BridgingIT.DevKit.Common.Result%601 on the entity. If the Result is a Failure, the transaction stops and returns that failure.

syntax.content: public EntityChangeBuilder Set(Func> func)

symbols.name: Check(Func, string)
symbols.summary: Adds a validation check at the current position in the operation chain. If the predicate returns false, the transaction aborts with an error.

syntax.content: public EntityChangeBuilder Check(Func predicate, string errorMessage)

symbols.name: Check(Func, IResultError)
symbols.summary: Adds a validation check at the current position in the operation chain. If the predicate returns false, the transaction aborts with an error.

syntax.content: public EntityChangeBuilder Check(Func predicate, IResultError error)

symbols.name: Register(Func)
symbols.summary: Queues a custom domain event to be registered at Apply() end if changes occur. Note: This will throw an InvalidOperationException at runtime if the entity does not implement IAggregateRoot.

syntax.content: public EntityChangeBuilder Register(Func eventFactory) where TEvent : IDomainEvent

symbols.name: Register(Func)
symbols.summary: Queues a custom domain event to be registered at Apply() end if changes occur. Note: This will throw an InvalidOperationException at runtime if the entity does not implement IAggregateRoot.

syntax.content: public EntityChangeBuilder Register(Func eventFactory) where TEvent : IDomainEvent

symbols.name: Register(Func, IAggregateRoot)
symbols.summary: Queues a custom domain event to be registered on the specified target at Apply() end if changes occur. Note: This will throw an InvalidOperationException at runtime if the entity does not implement IAggregateRoot.

syntax.content: public EntityChangeBuilder Register(Func eventFactory, IAggregateRoot target = null) where TEvent : IDomainEvent

symbols.name: OnChanged(Action)
symbols.summary: Queues a custom action to be executed at Apply() end if changes occur.

syntax.content: public EntityChangeBuilder OnChanged(Action action)
